name: REPAIRBANKTOTALS_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE REPAIRBANKTOTALS_123_01
AS
DECLARE @BNACCREF   INT
DECLARE @AMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @TRANSTYPE  SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRCODE     SMALLINT
DECLARE @CLIENTREF  INT
DECLARE @DT         DATETIME
DECLARE @SIGN       SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRNET      FLOAT
DECLARE @REPORTNET  FLOAT
DECLARE @CANCELLED     SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRNSTATE SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRANSDUEDATE   DATETIME
DECLARE @OPSTAT         SMALLINT
DECLARE @CEKREF         INT
DECLARE @STATUS         INT
DECLARE @DOC            INT
DECLARE @LREF           INT
DECLARE @COSTTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @BSMVTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @REPCOSTTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @REPBSMVTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @TRCOSTTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @TRBSMVTOT     FLOAT
DECLARE @BNTRANCOSTTOTINC  SMALLINT
DECLARE @CSTRANSREF     INT
set NOCOUNT ON
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_BNTOTFIL WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_BANKACC WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_BANKACC_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_GNTOTBN WHERE  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_BANKACC WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_BANKACC_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT BNACCREF, SUM(AMOUNT), TRANSTYPE, TRCODE, CLIENTREF, MIN(DATE_),
        SIGN, SUM(TRNET), SUM(REPORTNET), CANCELLED, TRNSTATE, MIN(TRANSDUEDATE), OPSTAT, SUM(COSTTOT), SUM(BSMVTOT), SUM(REPCOSTTOT), SUM(REPBSMVTOT), SUM(TRCOSTTOT), SUM(TRBSMVTOT), BNTRANCOSTTOTINC, STATUS, CSTRANSREF
 FROM LG_123_01_BNFLINE WITH(INDEX = I123_01_BNFLINE_I4) WHERE  BNACCREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_BANKACC WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_BANKACC_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 GROUP BY DATEPART(MONTH, DATE_), BNACCREF, TRANSTYPE, TRCODE, CLIENTREF,
       SIGN, CANCELLED, TRNSTATE, DATEPART(MONTH,TRANSDUEDATE), OPSTAT, DATEPART(YEAR, DATE_), DATEPART(YEAR, TRANSDUEDATE), BNTRANCOSTTOTINC, STATUS, CSTRANSREF
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @BNACCREF, @AMOUNT, @TRANSTYPE, @TRCODE, @CLIENTREF, @DT, @SIGN, @TRNET,
     @REPORTNET, @CANCELLED, @TRNSTATE, @TRANSDUEDATE, @OPSTAT, @COSTTOT, @BSMVTOT, @REPCOSTTOT, @REPBSMVTOT, @TRCOSTTOT, @TRBSMVTOT, @BNTRANCOSTTOTINC, @STATUS, @CSTRANSREF
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   IF (@TRCODE = 2) OR (@TRCODE = 3) OR (@TRCODE = 4)
    BEGIN
       IF (@BNTRANCOSTTOTINC = 0)
        BEGIN SELECT @AMOUNT = @AMOUNT + @COSTTOT + @BSMVTOT
              SELECT @REPORTNET = @REPORTNET + @REPCOSTTOT + @REPBSMVTOT
              SELECT @TRNET = @TRNET + @TRCOSTTOT + @TRBSMVTOT
        END ELSE
             BEGIN SELECT @AMOUNT = @AMOUNT - @COSTTOT + @BSMVTOT
                   SELECT @REPORTNET = @REPORTNET - @REPCOSTTOT + @REPBSMVTOT
                   SELECT @TRNET = @TRNET - @TRCOSTTOT + @TRBSMVTOT
             END
    END
   BEGIN TRANSACTION
     EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_BNTRANS_123_01 1, @BNACCREF, @AMOUNT, @TRANSTYPE, @TRCODE, @CLIENTREF, @DT, @SIGN,
                                      @TRNET, @REPORTNET, @CANCELLED, @TRNSTATE, @TRANSDUEDATE, @OPSTAT, @STATUS, @CSTRANSREF
   COMMIT TRANSACTION
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @BNACCREF, @AMOUNT, @TRANSTYPE, @TRCODE, @CLIENTREF, @DT, @SIGN, @TRNET, @REPORTNET, @CANCELLED,
        @TRNSTATE, @TRANSDUEDATE, @OPSTAT, @COSTTOT, @BSMVTOT, @REPCOSTTOT, @REPBSMVTOT, @TRCOSTTOT, @TRBSMVTOT, @BNTRANCOSTTOTINC, @STATUS, @CSTRANSREF
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
SELECT LOGICALREF,AMOUNT,DOC,TRNET,REPORTNET FROM LG_123_01_CSCARD
WHERE DEVIR = 1 AND DOC IN (1,2)
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @LREF,@AMOUNT,@DOC,@TRNET,@REPORTNET
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   BEGIN TRANSACTION
        SELECT @CEKREF=0
        SELECT @STATUS=0
    SELECT @BNACCREF = CARDREF, @DT = DATE_,@STATUS=STATUS ,@CEKREF = LOGICALREF FROM
    LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE CSREF= @LREF AND CARDMD=7 AND DEVIR=1 AND STATUS IN (3,4,5)  AND  CARDREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_BANKACC WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_BANKACC_I2)  WHERE (ACTIVE IN (0)))
 IF @CEKREF <> 0
         BEGIN
              IF (@DOC = 1) AND (@STATUS = 4)
     SELECT @TRANSTYPE = 3
        IF (@DOC = 1) AND (@STATUS = 3)
  SELECT @TRANSTYPE = 2
       IF (@DOC = 2) AND (@STATUS IN (4,5))
     SELECT @TRANSTYPE = 2
        IF (@DOC = 2) AND (@STATUS = 3)
  SELECT @TRANSTYPE = 1
               EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_BNTRANS_123_01 1, @BNACCREF, @AMOUNT, @TRANSTYPE, 5, 0, @DT, 0,
                                         @TRNET, @REPORTNET, 0, 0, @DT, 0, 0, 0
         END
   COMMIT TRANSACTION
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @LREF,@AMOUNT,@DOC,@TRNET,@REPORTNET
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
